query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.territories, up.industries
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON up.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Brett%' OR u.name LIKE '%Dan%'
ORDER BY u.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute
